name: Skyline Furniture Hendrix Counter Height Barstool White Velvet: Modern Square Upholstered, Padded Back
description:
Absolutely timeless, the Hendrix Counter Stool from Cloth & Co. Secure the ideal counter height stool for your home when you select this versatile piece. With its hand upholstered on trend fabric and superior construction, you can feel good about adding it to your overall entertainment space design. Manufactured in Illinois and Made to order in Illinois, this square chair is graced with tasteful tapered wooden legs that add an air of sophistication, and each has a solid crossbar that lends strength to the frame. In addition, the armless construction makes it perfect for islands and other gathering areas.

Cloth & Company is where textile, technology and a tradition of craftmanship meet. Inspired by the latest trends in fashion that are brought to life using state-of-the-art digital printing and 3D technology. The end result is beautifully designed, made to order furniture.




Overall Width: 19 Inches
Overall Height: 40 Inches
Overall Depth: 24 Inches
Seat Height: 26 Inches
